scripts.copy-deps: mkdir -p web/static/dist/js web/static/dist/css && cp node_modules/htmx.org/dist/htmx.min.js web/static/dist/js/ && cp node_modules/alpinejs/dist/cdn.min.js web/static/dist/js/alpine.min.js && cp node_modules/@alpinejs/sort/dist/cdn.min.js web/static/dist/js/alpine-sort.min.js && cp node_modules/@alpinejs/collapse/dist/cdn.min.js web/static/dist/js/alpine-collapse.min.js && cp -r node_modules/tinymce web/static/dist/js/ && cp node_modules/klaro/dist/klaro-no-css.js web/static/dist/js/klaro.min.js && cp node_modules/klaro/dist/klaro.css web/static/dist/css/klaro.css && cp node_modules/prismjs/themes/prism-tomorrow.css web/static/dist/css/prism.css && for f in node_modules/prismjs/prism.js node_modules/prismjs/components/prism-c.min.js node_modules/prismjs/components/prism-cpp.min.js node_modules/prismjs/components/prism-csharp.min.js node_modules/prismjs/components/prism-go.min.js node_modules/prismjs/components/prism-java.min.js node_modules/prismjs/components/prism-json.min.js node_modules/prismjs/components/prism-bash.min.js node_modules/prismjs/components/prism-python.min.js node_modules/prismjs/components/prism-ruby.min.js node_modules/prismjs/components/prism-markup-templating.min.js node_modules/prismjs/components/prism-php.min.js node_modules/prismjs/components/prism-rust.min.js node_modules/prismjs/components/prism-sql.min.js node_modules/prismjs/components/prism-typescript.min.js node_modules/prismjs/components/prism-markdown.min.js node_modules/prismjs/components/prism-yaml.min.js node_modules/prismjs/components/prism-docker.min.js node_modules/prismjs/components/prism-nginx.min.js; do cat $f; echo; done > web/static/dist/js/prism-bundle.min.js
